name: Elbow Incongruency
description: Elbow incongruency is a mismatch in the growth rates of the radius and ulna that distorts normal elbow joint conformity. It predisposes to multiple forms of elbow dysplasia and causes early-onset osteoarthritis.
treatment_overview: Dynamic proximal ulnar osteotomy (DPUO) or ulnar ostectomy can correct incongruency if performed early. Management otherwise follows elbow dysplasia protocols.
prevention_tips: Control rapid growth in predisposed breeds
